success_strong_fit.fitSummary: Strong fit based on product strategy, AI product work, and enterprise SaaS background.
gaps: Healthcare domain depth could be stronger
tailoredBulletSuggestions: Led AI-powered workflow roadmap that improved activation by 24%.
Partnered with engineering and GTM to ship enterprise features across multiple customer segments.
success_strong_fit.outreachAngle: Highlight AI workflow ownership and enterprise stakeholder influence.

success_mid_fit.fitSummary: Reasonable fit but missing depth in healthcare and direct platform ownership.
tailoredBulletSuggestions: Emphasize experimentation, SQL fluency, and KPI reporting.
success_mid_fit.outreachAngle: Position as analytical growth operator with fast ramp potential.
risks: May be screened out for domain mismatch

success_low_fit.fitSummary: Weak fit due to seniority mismatch and missing core requirements.
success_low_fit.outreachAngle: Only pursue if strong referral exists.
